description.para: 0xXXXXYYYY - Error code format XXXX - Major error code - PLM/LOADER/XPLMI error codes as defined in xplmi_status.h YYYY - Minor error code - Libraries / Drivers error code as defined in respective modules

briefdescription.para: To set warning in major error code.
To set warning in minor error code.
Error in clearing buffer.
Buffer is successfully cleared.
0x100 - Error when DMA driver lookup fails.
0x101 - Error when DMA driver config fails.
0x102 - Error when DMA Self test fails.

detaileddescription.para: It occurs when DMA is in reset and PLM tries to initialize it

Platform specific Status codes used in PLMI from 0x1A0 to 0x1FF.

detaileddescription.para: 0x1A0 - Error when the SSIT event vector table is full and PLM is trying to register a new event

briefdescription.para: 0x1A1 - Error when the event origin is not valid
0x1A2 - Error when any SSIT event related APIs are called from SLR where it is not supported
0x1A3 - Error when the given SlrIndex is invalid
0x1A4 - Error when the request to trigger an event between slave slrs which is not supported
0x1A5 - Error when request is received to trigger an event which is not registered with PLM
0x1A6 - Error when an event is pending and the request comes to trigger the same again
0x1A7 - Error when the triggered event is not acknowledged within given TimeOut value
0x1A8 - Error when SSIT request or response buffer size exceeds
0x1A9 - Error when the given event is not supported to be triggered from the running SLR
0x1AA - Error when an event is not pending and the request comes to write to the response buffer
0x1AB - SSIT interrupts are not enabled.

detaileddescription.para: Hence, cannot trigger the event

briefdescription.para: 0x1AC - SSIT error in slave PDI load status SYNC to master
0x1AD - Error when the IPI message event received by Slave SLR is not permitted due to access permission violation
0X1AE - Error if configure secure communication has invalid source address in payload
0x1AF - Error if secure plm to plm communication fails at encryption on master side
0x1B0 - Error if secure plm to plm communication fails at decryption on master side
0x1B1 - Error if secure plm to plm communication fails at encryption on slave side
0x1B2 - Error if secure plm to plm communication fails at decryption on slave side
0x1B3 - Error when IPI request size exceeds
0x1B4 - Error if key write fails during secure plm to plm communication establishment
0x1B5 PSM IPI handler task received invalid buffer index
0x1B6 PSM IPI event structure not initialized
0x1B7 Error when TPM initialization gets failed
Status codes used in PLM.

detaileddescription.para: 0x200 - Error when task create fails. This can happen when max tasks are created

briefdescription.para: 0x201 - Error initializing the PM Module
0x202 - XPLM_ERR_RESERVED_202
0x203 - Exception has occurred during PLM initialization.

detaileddescription.para: EAR and ESR are printed on UART console if enabled

0x209 - Error while sending IPI
0x20A - Error while clearing the PMC CDO region in PMC RAM
0x20B - Error while creating STL diagnostic task
0x20C - Error while removing STL diagnostic task
Status codes used in XLOADER.

detaileddescription.para: 0x300 - Error for unsupported bootmode. It occurs if invalid boot mode is selected or selected boot mode peripheral is not selected in CIPS

briefdescription.para: 0x301 - Error when USB is used as primary boot mode.

detaileddescription.para: USB boot mode is not supported as primary boot mode

briefdescription.para: 0x302 - Multiple conditions can give this error.

listitem.para: If PLM is unable to read image header table

0x304 - Error if partition header checksum fails

0x1A7 - Error when the triggered event is not acknowledged within given TimeOut value
0x1A8 - Error when SSIT request or response buffer size exceeds
0x1A9 - Error when the given event is not supported to be triggered from the running SLR

detaileddescription.para: 0x1A0 - Error when the SSIT event vector table is full and PLM is trying to register a new event

briefdescription.para: 0x1A1 - Error when the event origin is not valid
0x1A2 - Error when any SSIT event related APIs are called from SLR where it is not supported
0x1A3 - Error when the given SlrIndex is invalid
0x1A4 - Error when the request to trigger an event between slave slrs which is not supported
0x1A5 - Error when request is received to trigger an event which is not registered with PLM
0x1A6 - Error when an event is pending and the request comes to trigger the same again
0x1A7 - Error when the triggered event is not acknowledged within given TimeOut value
0x1A8 - Error when SSIT request or response buffer size exceeds
0x1A9 - Error when the given event is not supported to be triggered from the running SLR
0x1AA - Error when an event is not pending and the request comes to write to the response buffer
0x1AB - SSIT interrupts are not enabled.

detaileddescription.para: Hence, cannot trigger the event

briefdescription.para: Status codes used in PLMI.

briefdescription.para: Status for PLM functions.
This function is called in PLM error cases.

parameterdescription.para: is the error code written to the FW_ERR register

listitem.para: Check if SLR Type is Master or Monolithic and take error action accordingly.
Fallback if boot PDI is not done else just return, so that we receive next requests

inbodydescription.para: Trigger FW CR error by setting CR_Flag in FW_ERR register

listitem.para: If boot mode is jtag, do not reset. This is to keep the system state intact for further debug.
Update Multiboot register and perform SRST. Skip for slave boot modes.
If boot mode is USB or SMAP, PLM should not process remaining tasks in slave boot modes.

inbodydescription.para: In case of partial PDI failure, PLM prints log level is set to 0 after logging the first error and it gets restored to default value here. This is done to avoid printing of repeated error messages(only in the path of partial PDI)

briefdescription.para: This function is called for logging PLM error into FW_ERR register.

parameterdescription.para: is the error code written to the FW_ERR register

briefdescription.para: This is the header file which contains status codes for the PLM, PLMI and loader in versal_2vp platform.

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes ----- ---- -------- ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- 2.3 tvp 07/07/25 Initial release tvp 07/07/25 Added XLOADER_TRNG_INIT_FAIL error code for TRNG initialization tvp 07/07/25 Added error codes for OCP support tvp 07/10/25 Added XLOADER_ERR_SECURE_CONFIG_MEASUREMENT error code tvp 07/10/25 Added XPLM_ERR_PUF_DISABLED error code 2.4 abh 01/01/2026 Added error code for OSPI Prescaler and IDAC controller fails gnr 01/06/26 Added XLOADER_ERR_INVALID_CPUID error code aa 02/03/2026 Added error code for OSPI dummy cycle configuration failure aa 03/09/2026 Added error code for USB download timeout aa 04/01/2026 Added XLOADER_ERR_USB_DDR_OVERFLOW error code obs 04/03/2026 Reserved the unused error codes

Ver Who Date Changes ----- ---- -------- ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- 2.3 sd 10/13/25 Initial release 2.4 abh 01/01/2026 Added error code for OSPI Prescaler and IDAC controller fails gnr 01/06/26 Added XLOADER_ERR_INVALID_CPUID error code aa 02/03/2026 Added error code for OSPI dummy cycle configuration failure aa 03/09/2026 Added error code for USB download timeout tvp 03/13/2026 Add error codes related to authenticated boot aa 04/01/2026 Added XLOADER_ERR_USB_DDR_OVERFLOW error code obs 04/03/2026 Reserved the unused error codes
